sutta: buddha said monks these 5 things lead to the falling away of a man who is partially released what 5 delight in work in gossip and sleep in company and he does not look at the mind as released early monks these are the 5 things that lead to the falling away of a monk who is partially released as the end of the suta
commentary: what is among who is partially released this would probably refer to an arya yeah and arya is partially released from bondage from samsara so these are the things that uh that obstruct among from progressing further too much work and activity yeah too much activity or work and then uh gossip talking with other mouse uh too much sleep and the fourth 1 is he likes to mix with others in company that's not he's not aloof he's a type of monk who is aloof there's a type of monk who likes company and then the last 1 he does not look as the ma he does not look at the mind as released and this is as i mentioned before there's quite an interesting 1 that means basically our mind is not in bondage it's only the thinking that makes us in bondage if all our thinking were to stop and there is no no suffering as we see so these are the things that obstruct manga and this is already mentioned in 1 of the filters earlier
